info.title: FAM Backend API
info.description: Family event management platform — three-role auth (user/admin/organizer), family tree, QR join, notifications.

post.summary: Send OTP to user's email
post.description: Creates a temporary user record if email is new. Rate limited: 5 req/15 min.

200.description: OTP sent. isNewUser=true means username+dob required on verify-otp.

post.summary: Verify OTP and receive JWT tokens
post.description: For new users (isNewUser=true from send-otp), pass username and dob in the same call to complete registration. OTP expires in 5 minutes.

200.description: Login successful — returns access token (7d), refresh token (30d), and user object

400.description: Invalid or expired OTP, or username already taken

post.summary: Exchange refresh token for a new access token
Invalidate current session (clears refresh token on user record)

get.summary: Get current user's full profile (joined events populated)
Get current user's profile (same as GET /api/auth/profile)

200.description: User profile object — see /api/auth/profile for full schema

patch.description: All fields optional. profileImage must be empty string or a Cloudinary HTTPS URL — use POST /api/user/profile/upload-image to upload.

profileImage.description: Must be a Cloudinary HTTPS URL or empty string

400.description: Username already taken or invalid profileImage URL

post.summary: Upload profile photo (multipart/form-data). Uploads to Cloudinary at 400×400 face crop.

200.description: Image uploaded, URL saved on user record

400.description: No image file provided or upload error

get.summary: Get user's event join history with latest tree snapshots

200.description: List of joined events with latest tree snapshot for each

get.summary: Get latest 50 notifications for the user

post.summary: Admin login with name + password
post.description: Rate limited: 5 req/15 min. Login uses name, not email.

200.description: Returns access token (24h) and admin object

post.summary: Admin logout

get.summary: Get admin profile (no password field)
Get admin dashboard statistics

post.summary: Create a new event — automatically creates an Organizer account (temp password emailed)

get.summary: Paginated list of all events
All events with participant and relationship counts (no pagination)
Get event by MongoDB ID or event code — includes rich stats and recent activity

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: MongoDB ObjectId or event code (e.g. smithweddi4821)

200.description: Event with stats, top contributors, recent activity

get.summary: Get event by MongoDB ObjectId
Get event by event code

delete.summary: Soft-delete an event (sets isActive=false). Also deactivates all organizers for the event.

patch.summary: Update tree visibility for an event

get.summary: All participants, pending approvals, organizers and top contributors for a specific event

200.description: Participants, pending approvals, organizers, top contributors

get.summary: Detailed profile, relationships and stats for one user within an event

200.description: User event detail with relationships and stats

post.summary: Create a standalone organizer (not tied to event creation)
post.description: Only name and email are required. assignedEvent and validTill are optional (validTill defaults to 90 days from now). Default permissions: moderate_tree, approve_users, manage_schedule, view_participants.

400.description: Name and email are required, or email already exists

get.summary: All organizers with populated assignedEvent and createdBy
Single organizer with populated event and creator
Paginated list of all users
Paginated list of blocked users with event/relationship counts
Dashboard summary: totals, monthly trend, recently blocked, most active blocked users
Detailed profile, relationships, events and activity logs for one blocked user

post.summary: Unblock all currently blocked users in one operation. No body required.

get.summary: Paginated list of all moderation reports
Reports for a specific event
Paginated system/audit logs

post.summary: Organizer login with email + password
post.description: Rate limited: 5 req/15 min. Returns 24h access token.

200.description: Returns access token (24h) and organizer object

post.summary: Organizer logout

get.summary: Get organizer profile with populated assignedEvent
Full event document with populated participants and creator
Participants of the assigned event (username, email, dob, profileImage, phone, location, addedPeopleCount)
Dashboard statistics for the assigned event
Users waiting for approval to join the event
Get current approval mode of the assigned event

patch.summary: Update approval mode for the assigned event
Approve a pending user — moves from pendingApprovals to participants and sends notification
Reject a pending user — removes from pendingApprovals and sends rejection notification

post.summary: Create or find user by email and add them directly to event participants (bypasses approval)

get.summary: All relationships in the assigned event where isValidated=false

patch.summary: Validate or reject a proposed relationship

isValidated.description: true to validate, false to invalidate

post.summary: Check if an event code is valid before joining (public, rate limited)
Join an event by code. Routes to participants (auto) or pendingApprovals (manual).

200.description: joinStatus is approved (auto mode) or pending_approval (manual mode)

get.summary: Paginated event list for the authenticated user
Single event with populated creator, organizers and participants
Get QR code image URL for an event

200.description: QR code Cloudinary URL and event code

get.summary: Paginated, searchable participant list. Users must be event participants; org/admin have unrestricted access.
Get the current family tree. treeVisibility on the event controls access.

parameters.name: familySide
parameters.description: For wedding/anniversary events — returns only that sub-tree

200.description: Tree with nodes[], edges[], and mermaidCode

get.summary: Tree snapshot history. Users must be participants; organizers must be assigned to the event.

200.description: Array of tree snapshots ordered by date

get.summary: Discover how two people are related

post.summary: Add a family relationship. Users added by regular users start with isValidated=false; organizer/admin skip validation.
post.description: Validation rules: no duplicate edges, no circular ancestry, parent must be ≥12 years older than child, non-main users can add at most 4 relationships. For wedding/anniversary events familySide is required.

tree.description: Updated tree with nodes, edges, mermaidCode

example: Parent must be older than child

403.description: Must be an approved participant to add relationships
Not authorized or relationship not found

post.summary: Set the central person for a common event. This person is exempt from the 4-person add limit. (admin/organizer only)
Set groom and bride for a wedding event. Creates a spouse relationship and sets event.treeType=wedding. (admin/organizer only)

get.summary: Paginated notification list for the current user

patch.summary: Mark all notifications for the current user as read
Mark a single notification as read

delete.summary: Delete a notification (only owner can delete)

post.summary: Submit a moderation report. User must be an event participant.

reportedUser.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the reported user (optional)

reportedRelationship.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the reported relationship (optional)

403.description: Must be a participant to submit a report

get.summary: Paginated list of all reports (admin only)

patch.summary: Review a report — mark as reviewed, dismissed, or actioned (admin only)

get.summary: Reports for a specific event (organizer or admin)

post.summary: Activate WorldTree subscription (payment stub — no real payment gateway yet). Sets 1-year validity.

get.summary: Get the current user's personal WorldTree. Returns 403 if subscription not active.

200.description: WorldTree object with nodes and edges

post.summary: Save/replace tree data for the user's WorldTree

get.summary: Get event details and form field definitions for the QR scan join page (public)

200.description: Event info and form field definitions

post.summary: Join event by scanning QR code. Creates or updates user, uploads photo to Cloudinary, then handles approval mode.
post.description: Either eventId or eventCode must be provided. profilePhoto (base64 data URL) is required.

eventId.description: MongoDB ObjectId of the event (provide eventId or eventCode)

profilePhoto.description: Base64 data URL of profile photo

200.description: joinStatus is approved (auto mode) or pending_approval (manual mode)

400.description: Missing required fields, event inactive, or userData invalid

tags.name: User
tags.description: Authenticated user profile and notification preferences — requires User JWT

tags.name: Admin
tags.description: Admin-only management endpoints — requires Admin JWT (name+password login, 24h expiry)

tags.name: Organizer
tags.description: Organizer endpoints — email+password auth, 24h JWT, single assigned event

tags.name: Events
tags.description: Event discovery, joining, and management — validate-code is public

tags.name: Tree
tags.description: Family tree generation, relationship management, and moderation

tags.name: Notifications
tags.description: In-app notifications — also delivered real-time via Socket.IO

tags.name: WorldTree
tags.description: Premium personal family tree — payment-gated, 1-year validity

tags.name: QR
tags.description: Public QR-code join flow — no authentication required
